User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system (either a Gym Client or Gym Owner/Admin).

id.description: Unique user ID matching Auth UID

avatarUrl.description: Google avatar URL or custom profile image

ClientProfile.title: ClientProfile
ClientProfile.description: Detailed fitness and biometric measurements for normal gym members (clients).

measurements.description: Height, weight, biological percentages and limbs measurements

goals.description: Weight ranges, targeted body fat, and goal kind

WorkoutSession.title: WorkoutSession
WorkoutSession.description: A workout session logged by a Client or prescribed to them by the Gym Owner/Coach.

creatorId.description: Who created this workout (User themselves or Gym Owner)

exercises.description: Exercises, sets, weights and reps list

isAssignedByOwner.description: Flag to mark if the owner of the gym assigned this workout

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Announcements made by Gym Owners/Admin that are visible to all clients.

/users/{userId}.description: Registered gym users mapped by authorization identifier

/clientProfiles/{userId}.description: Target fitness indicators and parameters of the gym member client

/announcements/{announcementId}.description: Gym owner bulletins and administrative posts broadcasted to members
